name: Gunpla News Industrial 7 - Curate Archive Post

parameters.text:
=Industrial 7 Gunpla Curator.

Input: title="{{ $json.title }}", source="{{ $json.source }}", content="{{ $json.content }}".

Score 0-10 urgency:
10: PGU/MGSD/P-Bandai <48h
9: MG Ver.Ka/reissue FOMO
7-8: HG/RG reveal
<6: Teaser

Output **JSON ONLY**, no prose:
{"title":"{{ $json.title }}","source":"{{ $json.source }}","content":"{{ $json.content }}","score":10,"approve":true,"postCopy":"🚨 MGSD PHP15k FOMO HLJ/Shopee","tags":["MGSD","Tier1"],"tier":"

=JSON ONLY. NO PROSE. NO EXPLANATIONS. NO SUMMARY. START WITH [ END WITH ].

You receive ARRAY of Gunpla news. LOOP EACH:

1. Score 0-10: 10=PGU/MGSD/P-Bandai<48h/GUNJAP exclusive; 9=RG reissue; 5-7=HG review; <5=archive.
2. Approve: true >=8 (FB urgent).
3. postCopy: 150w PH hype/FOMO/PHP est (HG1.5k/MG4k/PG15k)/affiliate (HLJ/AmiAmi).
4. tags: [MGSD,PGU].
5. image_url: bandai-hobby.net/kit.jpg sim.
6. php_price_est: "15000".
7. tier: "urgent"/"digest".

SCHEMA: [{"title":str,"source":str,"score":int,"approve":bool,"postCopy":str,"tags":[str],"image_url":str,"php_price_est":str,"tier":str}]

EXAMPLE INPUT: [{"title":"MGSD Test","source":"gunjap"}]
EXAMPLE OUTPUT: [{"title":"MGSD Test","source":"gunjap","score":9,"approve":true,"postCopy":"🚨 MGSD drop PHP8k FOMO HLJ!","tags":["MGSD"],"image_url":"bandai-hobby.net/mg.jpg","php_price_est":"8000","tier":"urgent"}]

PROCESSED ARRAY:

parameters.subject: n8n Gmail Test - Gunpla Pipeline
parameters.message:
✅ Gmail node working!

This is your Tier1 approval pipeline test.
Score: 10/10 MGSD confirmed.

assignments.name: title
assignments.value:
=Low stock item!
1/144 HGUC RX-93 Nu Gundam - {{ $('get bit ly').item.json.data }}

name: TEST FB POSTING - EDGE - WORKING - 3/7/2026 copy

parameters.subject: =⚠️ FB Token Expires in {{ $json.daysLeft }} days — Action Required
parameters.text:
=FB Page Access Token for Universal Gunpla expires in {{ $json.daysLeft }} days.

Expiry: {{ $json.expiry }}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
STEP 1: Get new permanent token
https://developers.facebook.com/tools/explorer

STEP 2: Visit this URL after refreshing token
(replace NEW_EXPIRY_DATE with actual ISO date):

http://localhost:5679/webhook/token-update?expires=NEW_EXPIRY_DATE

Example:
http://localhost:5679/webhook/token-update?expires=2026-07-12T00:00:00Z

STEP 3: Update FB credential in n8n → Credentials
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

parameters.jsCode:
const threshold = $input.first().json.stock_threshold ?? 5;
return [{ json: { ...$input.first().json, fetch_url: `http://host.docker.internal:8001/low-stock?threshold=${threshold}` }}];
return $input.all().flatMap(i => (i.json.items || []).map(item => ({ json: item })));
